prompt: Create a dramatic studio food advertisement poster on a dark black textured background with moody, high-contrast lighting and rich warm orange tones. The composition is vertical and split visually: bold stacked ad copy on the left, hero food action on the right. Show a deep rustic bowl overflowing with triangular cheddar corn chips in the lower center-right, with thick glossy cheese sauce being poured in a continuous stream from a tilted dark metal saucepan entering from the upper right. The cheese lands heavily on top of the chips and drapes over them in thick molten folds. Behind the bowl on the left, place 1 upright red snack bag with a large yellow-orange starburst graphic and the brand text CRUNCHY CHIPZ in big white outlined letters, plus smaller flavor text ZESTY CHEDDAR and tiny subtitle "FLAVORED CORN SNACKS". Print tiny text near the lower left of the bag: "SAVORY TRIANGLES". Add 2 small condiment bowls on the dark tabletop: 1 shallow bowl of shredded cheddar in the bottom left corner and 1 tiny bowl of reddish seasoning near the bottom center-right. Scatter a few crumbs and cheese shreds across the table, with a dark napkin tucked under the main bowl. Include bold distressed condensed uppercase typography in a vintage poster style. On the upper left, stack the headline in 5 lines reading: THE ULTIMATE MUNCH. with "THE" on line 1, "ULTIMATE" on line 2, and "MUNCH." on line 3 in large type, followed by line 4 "EXPERIENCE" and line 5 "TRUE UMAMI." in smaller white text. Beneath that, add 2 promotional lines in orange: OVER 300 REVIEWS.. In the bottom right, place a 3-line orange callout reading DIP, POUR, MUNCH.. Use cinematic food photography styling, sharp focus on chips and cheese stream, appetizing glossy textures, commercial packaging realism, premium snack-brand ad aesthetic.
